heading: No additional funds authorized
label: 1513 No additional funds authorized
text: No additional funds are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter, or the amendments made by this title. This chapter, and the amendments made by this title, shall be carried out using amounts otherwise authorized.11See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title VI of div. P of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title VI to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
